S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox person Lyuhanci (lalu na theluw: ŚäČśľĘšĻč; lalu na ego: Joshua Liu; ryax sa 9 na byacing tay 4 squ kawas na 1991 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. malaysia hintgan. msqutux ka Titan(ś≥įŚĚ¶TITAN). lplpyung tay Daswesengreme mqyanux, lalu ga ŤôéÁČô.
